moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final Week
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by the USA, Canada, and Mexico, is in its thrilling final week, culminating in the final on July 19th.

angles.name: World Cup Hype
angles.copy: The biggest football tournament on the planet is reaching its climax! Who are you backing for the FIFA World Cup 2026 trophy this Sunday? #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Just days left until a new champion is crowned at the FIFA World Cup 2026! What's been your favourite moment of the tournament so far?

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins on Thursday, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running until July 19th.

angles.name: Golf Major Begins
angles.copy: Get ready for some world-class golf! The Open Championship tees off this Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Hosts
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is set to welcome the world's best golfers for The Open Championship from Thursday. Ready for a weekend of birdies and bogeys?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off on Wednesday, July 15th, in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, offering four days of music and culture.

angles.name: Celtic Fest Starts
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival begins tomorrow in Stornoway! Four days of incredible music and culture awaits. Who's heading to HebCelt?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Stornoway is buzzing! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts Wednesday, bringing fantastic acts to the Outer Hebrides. Get ready for some amazing live music!

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival returns to Wollaton Hall & Deer Park in Nottingham on July 18-19, featuring a diverse lineup across five stages.

angles.name: Nottingham Festival
angles.copy: Nottingham's biggest festival, Splendour, is just days away! Wollaton Hall is ready for a weekend of music on July 18-19. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Midlands Music
angles.copy: The countdown to Splendour Festival is on! This Saturday and Sunday, Nottingham will be alive with music. Grab your tickets if you haven't already!

moments.title: Together Again Festival
moments.blurb: Together Again Festival is set for July 24-26 at Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire, promising a celebration of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival
angles.copy: Next week, Bolesworth Castle hosts the Together Again Festival! Three days of music and good vibes in Cheshire, July 24-26. Who's planning their trip?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! Together Again Festival is coming to Cheshire from July 24th for a weekend of amazing music and arts. Tickets are still available!

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: Season 2 of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premiered globally on Netflix on July 12th, catching up with the latest relationship dramas.

angles.name: Reality TV Catch-up
angles.copy: Did you binge 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 this week? All the tea has been spilled! What are your thoughts on the latest updates?

angles.name: Post-Pods Drama
angles.copy: The pods are officially behind them, but the drama continues! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 is streaming now on Netflix. Who's watched it?

moments.title: New ITV Drama 'The Dark'
moments.blurb: The new moody thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, is airing on ITV, set in the Scottish wilderness.

angles.name: New Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Looking for a new drama? ITV's 'The Dark' is set in the stunning, yet mysterious, Scottish wilderness. Have you started watching this gripping thriller?

angles.name: Scottish Drama
angles.copy: The new ITV drama 'The Dark' is bringing some moody suspense to our screens, with a backdrop of the beautiful Scottish landscape. Perfect for these summer nights!

moments.title: UK Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are starting for many children across the UK this week, with dates varying by region (e.g., Scotland started late June, England/Wales around July 20th).

angles.name: Holidays are Here
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many kids across the UK are now officially on their summer holidays. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Summer Break Vibes
angles.copy: The great British summer holidays are kicking off! Whether you're staying local or heading off on an adventure, enjoy the break!

moments.title: Happy 39th to Dan Reynolds
moments.blurb: Dan Reynolds, lead singer of Imagine Dragons, turns 39 today (born 1987).

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Frontman
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to Imagine Dragons frontman Dan Reynolds, who turns 39 today! What's your favourite Imagine Dragons track?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Dan
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to the incredible Dan Reynolds of Imagine Dragons! Turn up 'Thunder' to celebrate!

moments.title: Happy 40th to Dan Smith
moments.blurb: Dan Smith, lead singer of British band Bastille, celebrates his 40th birthday today (born 1986).

angles.name: Bastille Lead Singer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 40th Birthday to Bastille's brilliant frontman, Dan Smith! What's your top Bastille song?

angles.name: Dan Smith Turns 40
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to Dan Smith! Celebrate with us by cranking up some Bastille!

moments.title: Happy 80th to Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Linda Ronstadt celebrates her 80th birthday tomorrow, July 15th (born 1946).

angles.name: Music Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Linda Ronstadt turns 80! A true music icon with hits across so many genres. What's your favourite of her songs?

angles.name: Celebrating Linda
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday for tomorrow to the legendary Linda Ronstadt! Her voice defined an era. What track are you playing to celebrate?

moments.title: Happy 35th to Olly Alexander
moments.blurb: Olly Alexander, lead singer of Years & Years and recent UK Eurovision representative, turns 35 tomorrow, July 15th (born 1991).

angles.name: Years & Years Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 35th Birthday to the brilliant Olly Alexander for tomorrow! From Years & Years to Eurovision, he's a true star. What's your top track?

angles.name: Pop & Dance Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Olly Alexander turns 35! Let's celebrate the Years & Years frontman with some of his amazing dance-pop anthems!

moments.title: Happy 49th to Ray Toro
moments.blurb: Ray Toro, guitarist and co-founder of My Chemical Romance, celebrates his 49th birthday tomorrow, July 15th (born 1977).

angles.name: MCR Guitarist Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Ray Toro of My Chemical Romance turns 49! What's your favourite MCR riff?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ray
angles.copy: Celebrating Ray Toro's 49th birthday tomorrow! The My Chemical Romance guitarist is a legend. What's your go-to MCR song?

moments.title: Happy 30th to Luke Hemmings
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead singer of 5 Seconds of Summer, turns 30 on Thursday, July 16th (born 1996).

angles.name: 5SOS Frontman's 30th
angles.copy: Huge Happy 30th Birthday to 5 Seconds of Summer's Luke Hemmings this Thursday! Celebrate by blasting your favourite 5SOS hits!

angles.name: Happy Birthday Luke
angles.copy: Luke Hemmings of 5 Seconds of Summer turns 30 on Thursday! What's the ultimate 5SOS track for his big day?

moments.title: Happy 62nd to Fatboy Slim
moments.blurb: British DJ and music producer Fatboy Slim (Norman Cook) celebrates his 62nd birthday on Thursday, July 16th (born 1964).

angles.name: Dance Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Fatboy Slim this Thursday! Get on the dance floor and celebrate the legend!

angles.name: Norman Cook Turns 62
angles.copy: Celebrating the iconic Fatboy Slim's 62nd birthday on Thursday! What's your favourite track from the Big Beat innovator?

moments.title: Happy 74th to Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, drummer for The Police, turns 74 on Thursday, July 16th (born 1952).

angles.name: Police Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary Stewart Copeland of The Police this Thursday! What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Stewart Copeland at 74
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday for Thursday to drumming legend Stewart Copeland! His work with The Police is timeless. What's your top pick?

moments.title: Happy 77th to Geezer Butler
moments.blurb: Geezer Butler, bassist and lyricist for heavy metal pioneers Black Sabbath, turns 77 on Friday, July 17th (born 1949).

angles.name: Metal Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath this Friday! The architect of so many iconic riffs. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Geezer Butler at 77
angles.copy: Celebrating Geezer Butler's 77th birthday on Friday! The Black Sabbath bassist is a true pioneer. Crank up some classic metal!

moments.title: Happy 41st to Tom Fletcher
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, lead singer and guitarist of McFly, turns 41 on Friday, July 17th (born 1985).

angles.name: McFly Frontman's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the multi-talented Tom Fletcher of McFly this Friday! What's your go-to McFly singalong?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Tom
angles.copy: Celebrating Tom Fletcher's 41st birthday on Friday! From McFly to author, he does it all. Which McFly tune are you playing?

moments.title: Happy 44th to Natasha Hamilton
moments.blurb: Natasha Hamilton, member of the pop group Atomic Kitten, celebrates her 44th birthday on Friday, July 17th (born 1982).

angles.name: Atomic Kitten Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 44th Birthday to Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton this Friday! Let's get 'Whole Again' on repeat!

angles.name: Natasha Hamilton Turns 44
angles.copy: Celebrating Natasha Hamilton's 44th birthday on Friday! Which Atomic Kitten song brings back the best memories for you?
